programmes.show_description: Celebrate the beauty of spring with Yana's Tulips Collection by Yana Smakula - featuring vibrant florals, European-inspired scenes, and heartfelt sentiments.
Tune in for a HobbyMaker Exclusive launch: the A3 Metallic Watercolour Artists Set, featuring a premium 24-metallic half-pan paint box with rich, vibrant colours.
Designed and manufactured by crafters for crafters. Jo Venison is back for HobbyMaker's 4th birthday with a brand new unit to organise your crafting space.
Step into the Sweet Factory for a feast of crafty goodies - from vibrant vinyls to colourful cardstock and more!
HobbyMaker Repeats.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
Stuart Hillard is going to be launching his March Block of the Month.
Hayley Smith is back with the new QAYG kits and the popular On The Roll designs.
...Trousers Pattern: Amber Elizabeth is with us demonstrating the sell out new pattern from Sussex Seamstress - The Ferring Trousers.
Hayley Smith is back in her second hour with Rainbow panels and fabric rolls!
...Dress Pattern: Amber Elizabeth is back in her second hour with this beautiful Summer dress by Sussex Seamstress.
Christine is back with another fantastic show featuring brand-new products - bringing you fresh ideas and must-have supplies to elevate your next crafting project.
Hunkydory's Moonstone dies are creative, easy to use, and of the highest quality. The new Life of Leisure range opens a world of creativity.
Debbi Moore returns to HobbyMaker to join our birthday celebrations, bringing something special for both digital and analogue crafters.
Christine is back with another fantastic show featuring brand-new products - bringing you fresh ideas and must-have supplies to elevate your next crafting project.
Ink stunning backgrounds with Hunkydory's new range of shaped masks. Each mask in the Shaped Florals Collection features a popular individual flower.
Debbi Moore returns to HobbyMaker to join our birthday celebrations, bringing something special for both digital and analogue crafters.
Tune in to discover Hunkydory's renowned 12" x 12" Adorable Scoreboard, now in a sleek Classic Cream Edition - plus the brand-new Adorable Scoreboard Handbook 9.
Tune in for acrylic and gouache paint sets and discover bold, vibrant colour like never before. Perfect for getting creative or gifting to someone ready to explore their arty side!

You're invited to a tea-party this hour with this beautiful Alice Collection!
Learn to up-cycle your old clothing and turn them into some bright and fresh with Allison Maryon.
...Way Crochet: Hayley West is back showcasing a brand new kit from Crochet Society - the Grow Your Own Way Crochet Kit.
Allison Maryon brings us some beautiful designs to add to your kitchenware.
Discover the essential tools every quilter needs, from precision rulers and rotary cutters to clever gadgets designed to make cutting, piecing, and finishing quilts easier.
Dreamees always bring pretty projects and beautiful designs but always within everyone's budget. Tune in for a new launch, especially for our birthday!
Sara Davies is in the studio as we celebrate our 4th birthday! Join us for the first hour of the Crafter's Companion Takeover and enjoy deals with Sara's 4th Birthday Bonanza Box.
Sara Davies is in the studio as we celebrate our 4th birthday! Join us for the second hour of the Crafter's Companion Takeover and discover the Wildwood Whimsy Collection.
Sara Davies is in the studio as we celebrate our 4th birthday! Join us for the final hour of the Crafter's Companion Takeover and enjoy special offers on the Template Library.
Dreamees always bring pretty projects and beautiful designs but always within everyone's budget. Tune in for a new launch, especially for our birthday!
The talented Carla Bagshaw returns to HobbyMaker with a fresh take on quilling! Don't miss her latest launch, the Chameleon and see how she brings this classic technique to life.
Discover Concept Watercolour Joy - the pad designed to bring colour, creativity, and painting pleasure to your everyday routine. Plus, enjoy the bookmark pad for maximum contrast.
Mix and match the coordinating stamps and dies to create elegant focal points, layered compositions, and meaningful sentiments for cards, scrapbook pages, journals, and gifts.
